name: Create Coordinate Plane Activity
description: An 8th grade math teacher needs a flipchart for a lesson on plotting ordered pairs. Create a 2-page ActivInspire flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/coordinate_plane.flipchart. The first page must include the title 'Plotting Ordered Pairs' and instruction text containing the phrase 'coordinate plane'. The second page must feature a coordinate plane with labeled x and y axes, the four quadrants labeled with Roman numerals (I, II, III, IV), and five plotted and labeled points: (3, 4), (-2, 5), (-4, -3), (5, -2), and (0, 0). Ensure all text labels are visible in the final file.
